---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Saint's Mile
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature valuable? What problem does it solve or what experience does it improve?

## Proposed Solution

How you envision the feature working. Be as specific as you can — UI behavior, game mechanics, expected interactions.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why they might not be as good.

## Additional Context

Any references, mockups, or examples from other games that illustrate what you mean.
